mapper.select:
SELECT wave_cd as waveCd, wave_nm as waveNm
FROM TB_WAVE_INFO WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT pu_cd as puCd, pu_nm as puNm
FROM TB_PU_INFO WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT cd, nm
FROM TB_SECT_INF WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT A.LOT_ID as lotId , A.STD_DT as stdDt , A.OPER as oper
, MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '00' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END) AS tPgIn , MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '01' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END) AS tNoGwang , MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '02' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END) AS t1stA , MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '03' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END) AS t1stA2 , MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '04' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END) AS t1stB , MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '05' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END) AS t1stB2 , MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '06' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END) AS t2nd , MIN(CASE WHEN B.OPER IN ('07', '08') THEN B.OPER_START_TM END) AS tAdd , MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '09' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END) AS [end]
, ROUND(CAST(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '00' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END), MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '01' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END)) AS FLOAT) / 1440.0, 2) AS vPgIn , ROUND(CAST(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '01' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END), MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '02' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END)) AS FLOAT) / 1440.0, 2) AS vNoGwang , ROUND(CAST(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '02' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END), MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '03' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END)) AS FLOAT) / 1440.0, 2) AS v1stA , ROUND(CAST(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '03' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END), MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '04' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END)) AS FLOAT) / 1440.0, 2) AS v1stA2 , ROUND(CAST(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '04' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END), MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '05' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END)) AS FLOAT) / 1440.0, 2) AS v1stB , ROUND(CAST(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '05' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END), MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '06' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END)) AS FLOAT) / 1440.0, 2) AS v1stB2 , ROUND(CAST(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '06' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END), MIN(CASE WHEN B.OPER IN ('07', '08') THEN B.OPER_START_TM END)) AS FLOAT) / 1440.0, 2) AS v2nd , ROUND(CAST(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MIN(CASE WHEN B.OPER IN ('07', '08') THEN B.OPER_START_TM END), MAX(CASE WHEN B.OPER = '09' THEN B.OPER_START_TM END)) AS FLOAT) / 1440.0, 2) AS vAdd
, A.LOT_CREATE_TM as lotCreateTm , A.LOT_OUT_TM as lotOutTm FROM TB_LOT A INNER JOIN TB_LOT_HISTORY B ON A.LOT_ID = B.LOT_ID AND B.OPER <= A.OPER GROUP BY A.LOT_ID, A.STD_DT, A.OPER, A.LOT_CREATE_TM, A.LOT_OUT_TM ORDER BY A.LOT_ID

SELECT #{year} AS year, W.WAVE_CD AS waveCd, W.WAVE_NM AS waveNm, ISNULL(T.FAB_IN, 0) AS fabIn, ISNULL(T.B1ST, 0) AS b1st, ISNULL(T.B2ST, 0) AS b2st, ISNULL(T.B3ST, 0) AS b3st, ISNULL(T.B4ST, 0) AS b4st, ISNULL(T.B5ST, 0) AS b5st, ISNULL(T.PG_IN, 0) AS pgin, ISNULL(T.A1ST, 0) AS a1st, ISNULL(T.A2ST, 0) AS a2st, ISNULL(T.A3ST, 0) AS a3st, ISNULL(T.A4ST, 0) AS a4st, ISNULL(T.A5ST, 0) AS a5st, ISNULL(T.FAB_OUT, 0) AS fabOut FROM TB_WAVE_INFO W LEFT JOIN TB_KPI_TARGET T ON W.WAVE_CD = T.WAVE_CD AND T.KPI_YEAR = #{year} ORDER BY CASE W.WAVE_CD WHEN 'EUV' THEN 1 WHEN 'Arf_I' THEN 2 WHEN 'Arf_F' THEN 3 WHEN 'GUV' THEN 4 WHEN 'OUV' THEN 5 WHEN 'SUV' THEN 6 WHEN 'RUV' THEN 7 END;

SELECT [YEAR] AS year , KPI_CD AS kpiCd , KPI_NM AS kpiNm , GUBUN AS gubun , KPI_VAL AS kpiVal , [1st_Sign] AS v1stSign , [1st_Val] AS v1stVal , [1st_Mon] AS v1stMon , [1st_UseYn] AS v1stUseYn , [2nd_Sign] AS v2ndSign , [2nd_Val] AS v2ndVal , [2nd_Mon] AS v2ndMon , [2nd_UseYn] AS v2ndUseYn , [3rd_Sign] AS v3rdSign , [3rd_Val] AS v3rdVal , [3rd_Mon] AS v3rdMon , [3rd_UseYn] AS v3rdUseYn , [4th_Sign] AS v4thSign , [4th_Val] AS v4thVal , [4th_Mon] AS v4thMon , [4th_UseYn] AS v4thUseYn , REG_ID AS regId , REG_DT AS regDt , MOD_ID AS modId , MOD_DT AS modDt FROM tb_kpi_m WHERE 1=1 order by kpicd asc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_KPI_TARGET_HIST_DETAIL ( HIST_ID, WAVE_CD, P_BIN, B1ST, B2ND, B3RD, B4TH, B5TH, P_GM, A1ST, A2ND, A3RD, A4TH, A5TH, F_ABOUT ) SELECT #{histId}, T.WAVE_CD, T.P_BIN, T.B1ST, T.B2ND, T.B3RD, T.B4TH, T.B5TH, T.P_GM, T.A1ST, T.A2ND, T.A3RD, T.A4TH, T.A5TH, T.F_ABOUT FROM TB_KPI_TARGET T WHERE T.KPI_YEAR = #{year}
